title: Pouteria clemensii
taxonomy: Pouteria clemensii is a species of plant within the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the sapote family. This family is a group of flowering plants that includes over 900 species of trees and shrubs. Pouteria clemensii is native to the Philippines.
